basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Odisha
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on the official website of WCD Odisha. A total of 05 vacancy has been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.details: Resident of the Anganwadi center area. Age between 21 to 35 years. Minimum 12th (+2) pass. Knowledge of Odia language (written and spoken). Willing to cook and serve food and assist Anganwadi workers.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Anganwadi Helper post is 21 May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is passing the 12th standard (10+2) examination.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Anganwadi Helper post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age as of 01.01.2023.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through the official WCD Odisha website.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Anganwadi Helper post is temporary.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for Anganwadi Helper ?
faq.answer: The post of Anganwadi Helper is an honorary post, meaning there is no fixed salary.

faq.question: Q8. Do I need to know Odia language to apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have knowledge of the Odia language, including the ability to read and write it clearly.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on an evaluation of educational qualifications and additional qualification certificates, with candidates having the highest marks being selected.
